top_findings.title: Brazilian standings/team-stats double-count overlapping match files
top_findings.evidence: soccer/loader.go:155 and soccer/loader.go:343 both tag brasileirao with no de-duplication; seasons 2012-2019 overlap (2019 has 380 rows in EACH file). store.go:148 GetStandings and store.go:92 GetTeamStats iterate all rows -> a team shows ~76 played / doubled points for a 38-game season. GoalsAverage (store.go:350) also computed over the duplicated set.
top_findings.suggestion: De-duplicate matches on (competition, season, date, home, away) at load time, or pick one canonical brasileirao source per season range before aggregating standings, team stats, and averages.

tracker: beads (no external issues created; this skill only aggregates assessment.json)
